codeReview.summary: The slides-inventory.json accurately enumerates all HTML files in slides/ (28) and slides/New/ (14). File counts match actual filesystem. Topic names are clean and extracted correctly. The 'expected' counts (53/19) were incorrect expectations from AGENTS.md - the actual counts (28/14) are what exists and the worker correctly documented this discrepancy as non-blocking.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md specifies source directories as C:\OsaZain_stuff\edu\ACSInternetProgramming\slides\ and slides\New\, but the actual repo root (and working directory) is C:\OsaZain_stuff\edu\ACSInternetProgramming\acs2902-web-programming\. The slides directories are one level up. This is documented correctly in AGENTS.md but could cause confusion.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md sourceFile paths vs actual file locations

notes: Verified against filesystem: slides/ has exactly 28 HTML files (matches inventory), slides/New/ has exactly 14 HTML files (matches inventory). All topic names correctly derived from filenames. Worker correctly identified that expected counts (53/19) were incorrect - actual filesystem has 28/14. The inventory is accurate and complete.
